function.name: get_dividend_info
function.description: Get dividend details for a stock symbol.
function.long_description: Retrieves dividend-related information such as annual dividend rate, dividend yield, and ex-dividend date for a specified stock symbol.

symbol.description: Stock ticker symbol such as AAPL, MSFT, JNJ

example_user_queries: What is the dividend history for KO?
Tell me about dividend payouts for T.
Show me dividend information on IBM.
Retrieve the dividend info for VZ.
Find dividend information using symbol O.
